extortion.description: As a leading expert for the marketing and distribution of acids/lyes, solvents as well as speciality chemicals we function with our own Network in all of Europe. Through our comprehensive services – reaching from storing, filling/bottling up and transporting to mixing and recycling chemicals. Furthermore we offer the qualified application consultancy services via our own field sales force – our 20.000 customers can purchase over 3,000 products as well as rely on many years of industry know-how and innovative solutions from one source.SITE: hugohaeffner.com Address  Friedrichstr. 3 D-71679 Asperg GERMANY
